zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Reresby II於大約1364年出生在英國越可爾瑟時，他的父親Thomas Reresby I51歲，母親Cicely Gothain55歲。他於大約1411年與Maude Bosville結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和6個女兒的父母。他去世於1439年3月28日在他的家鄉享年76歲，埋葬在英國越可爾瑟。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Reresby II于大约1364年出生在英国越可爾瑟时，他的父亲Thomas Reresby I51岁，母亲Cicely Gothain55岁。他于大约1411年与Maude Bosville结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和6个女儿的父母。他去世于1439年3月28日在他的家乡享年76岁，埋葬在英国越可爾瑟。

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Reresby II was born about 1364, in Thrybergh, Yorkshire, England, his father, Thomas Reresby I, was 51 and his mother, Cicely Gothain, was 55. He married Maude Bosville about 1411. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 6 daughters. He died on 28 March 1439, in his hometown, at the age of 76, and was buried in Thrybergh, Yorkshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Reresby II est né environ 1364, à Thrybergh, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Reresby I, avait 51 ans et sa mère, Cicely Gothain, avait 55 ans. Il a épousé Maude Bosville environ 1411. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 6 filles. Il est décédé le 28 mars 1439, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 76 ans, et a été enterré à Thrybergh, Everwyck, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas Reresby II um 1364 in Thrybergh, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas Reresby I 51 und seine Mutter Cicely Gothain 55. Er hat um 1411 Maude Bosville geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Er starb am 28. März 1439 im Alter von 76 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Thrybergh, Yorkshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Reresby II è nato il circa 1364 nel Thrybergh, Yorkshire, England, il suo padre, Thomas Reresby I, aveva 51 anni e il suo madre, Cicely Gothain, aveva 55 anni. Lui sposato Maude Bosville circa 1411. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 6 figlie. Morì il 28 marzo 1439, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 76 anni, e fu sepolto a Thrybergh, Yorkshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Reresby IIが約1364年にイギリスヨークシュアイアスリバーグで生まれた時，父Thomas Reresby Iは51歳，母Cicely Gothainは55歳であった。約1411年にMaude Bosvilleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼は1439年3月28日に故郷で76歳で死去し，イギリスヨークシュアイアスリバーグにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Reresby II(이)가 대략 1364년 영국 요르크실르 스리버그h에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Reresby I(은)는 51세였고, 그의 어머니 Cicely Gothain(은)는 55세였다. 그는 대략 1411년 Maude Bosville(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1439년 3월 28일 그의 고향에서 76세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 요르크실르 스리버그h에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Reresby II nasceu aproximadamente 1364, em Thrybergh, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas Reresby I, tinha 51 anos e sua mãe, Cicely Gothain, tinha 55 anos. Ele casou-se com Maude Bosville aproximadamente 1411. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 6 filhas. Ele faleceu em 28 de março de 1439, em sua cidade natal, com 76 anos, e foi sepultado em Thrybergh, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Reresby II родился около 1364 г. в местности трибирг, еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Thomas Reresby I было 51 год, а матери, которую звали Cicely Gothain, 55. Он женился на женщине по имени Maude Bosville около 1411 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 6 дочерей. Он умер 28 марта 1439 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 76 лет и был похоронен в местности трибирг, еркшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas Reresby II nació aproximadamente 1364, en Thrybergh, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Thomas Reresby I, tenía 51 años y su mamá, Cicely Gothain, tenía 55 años. Se casó con Maude Bosville aproximadamente 1411. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 6 hijas. Murió el 28 de marzo de 1439, en su pueblo, a la edad de 76 años, y fue sepultado en Thrybergh, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.
